meta.project: HelaDry - Solar-Powered IoT Hybrid Dehydrator System

product_overview: HelaDry is a mobile and cloud-backed companion system for a solar-powered IoT food dehydrator that enables remote monitoring, device control, and batch/session tracking. The backend exposes APIs for device lifecycle management, session history, and a service health endpoint.
core_goals: Enable secure registration and remote control of IoT dehydrator devices
Provide reliable session (batch) management and historical records for users
Expose simple, authenticated APIs that support both real-time control and periodic polling
Provide a minimal health-check endpoint for service monitoring

features.name: Health Check API
features.description: Lightweight endpoint to verify service availability and basic status for monitoring and CI checks.
user_flows: GET / -> Receive 200 with JSON {status: "ok", uptime, version}
GET / -> Receive 500 with JSON {error: "service_unavailable"} (monitoring alert / escalate)

features.name: Device Management API
features.description: Register devices to users, start/stop drying sessions, adjust device parameters (temperature, fan speed), and list a user's devices.
user_flows: POST /device/register with Authorization: Bearer <token> and payload {device_id, model, pairing_code} -> Receive 201 with {device_id, assigned_to_user}
POST /device/register without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
POST /device/register with Authorization but invalid payload (missing device_id) -> Receive 400 Bad Request with validation errors
POST /device/start with Authorization and payload {device_id, batch_params} -> Receive 200 with {session_id, status: "started"}
POST /device/start with Authorization and payload {device_id: unknown} -> Receive 404 Not Found
POST /device/stop with Authorization and payload {device_id, session_id} -> Receive 200 with {session_id, status: "stopped"}
POST /device/stop with Authorization and payload {device_id, session_id: already_stopped} -> Receive 400 Bad Request with message "session not active"
POST /device/update-temperature with Authorization and payload {device_id, target_temperature} -> Receive 200 with confirmation {device_id, target_temperature}
POST /device/update-temperature with Authorization and payload {device_id, target_temperature: out_of_range} -> Receive 400 Bad Request with validation error
POST /device/update-fan-speed with Authorization and payload {device_id, fan_speed} -> Receive 200 with confirmation {device_id, fan_speed}
POST /device/update-fan-speed with Authorization and malformed payload (fan_speed not a number) -> Receive 400 Bad Request
GET /device/list with Authorization -> Receive 200 with array of devices belonging to user
GET /device/list with expired/invalid token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Session Management API
features.description: Retrieve historical drying sessions (batches) for the authenticated user to view past runs and results.
user_flows: GET /session/my-sessions with Authorization -> Receive 200 with array of session objects (session_id, device_id, start_time, end_time, status, metrics)
GET /session/my-sessions with Authorization when backend datastore error occurs -> Receive 500 Internal Server Error

features.name: Health Check API
features.description: Basic health check for the backend service

features.name: Device Management API
features.description: Register, control, and list IoT drying devices

endpoints.description: Register a new device to a user
Start a drying session on a device
List all devices for the current user
Fetch past drying sessions for the user
